commit.subject: LU-3285 mdt: changes in ldlm locking for Data-on-MDT
commit.message:
LU-3285 mdt: changes in ldlm locking for Data-on-MDT

This patch preceedes the Data-on-MDT IO locking at MDC.
It introduces new DOM inodebit for Data-on-MDT files and
handle it properly. Patch also updates LVB handling and
glimpse functionality on MDT.

Signed-off-by: Mikhal Pershin <mike.pershin@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ibb16553152044b21efb780cf442d4a4d53debe01
